title: triangle.jar
description: Adds a terrifying Triangle creature with custom AI and jump-scare mechanics.
body:
### **_The Triangle — Psychological Horror Experience_**

The Triangle is not just another mob mod. It’s a horror project focused on the feeling that you are never alone. This entity doesn't just run at you to fight; it stalks you, messes with your mind, and disappears the moment you try to get a closer look.

What’s inside:

The Stalker: A mysterious entity with custom AI. It likes to watch you from a distance or hide behind trees. If you stare at it too long or run towards it — it simply vanishes.

Ghostly Encounters: Sometimes you’ll see him for just a split second in the corner of your eye. Did you really see him, or was it just a shadow?

Glitchy Mobs: Keep an eye on the animals. If a pig starts acting weird or vanishes when you get close, it means He is nearby.

Atmospheric Sounds: Creepy ambient noises and subtle audio cues will let you know when the entity is close, even if you can't see it.

How it changes the game:

Forget about feeling safe, even during the day. The Triangle can show up anywhere, making every forest trip or mining session feel like a horror movie. You'll find yourself constantly looking behind your back. Every shadow moves, and every sound feels like a threat.

Can you handle the pressure, or will you delete the world before He catches you?
